2393950.name: Light Odyssey
2393950.description:
Light Odyssey is a Boss-Rush Action game about taking down the Colossus of Light.
You find yourself at the edge of time in a demised civilization, and the only thing you can rely on is a dimming light.

Light Odyssey captures the interplay of light and darkness that strikes out as one of many distinctive graphic features, along with a fast-paced combat system, and an epic storyline in which you have to strike down gigantic enemies.
What transpired in these ancient ruins, and what is the origin of the formidable power wielded by the colossus who guard this place?

You must defeat the colossi and restore light into the world.


  • Discover dormant colossi in rock, fire, ice, and more.
  • Experience the unique combat system, cinematic, and challenges that require quick decisions.
  • Learn new combat and passive skills that will assist you in battle.
  • Uncover ancient secrets by deciphering symbols found in ancient ruins.
2393950.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 日语*, 简体中文*, 繁体中文*, 韩语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
